name: MHA - Role Reverse RPG
description:
Welcome to My Hero Academia.

It still works. That’s the problem.

This is My Hero Academia—same geography, same Quirks, same schools, same institutions.
Nothing is broken at the surface level.

The people in power, however, are wrong.

We begin at the U.A. Entrance Exam Arc. Same time period. Same starting line.
What happens next is not canon. It’s consequence.

🌍 THE WORLD

The public still believes in heroes.
The system still functions.
Order still exists.

But the roles are swapped. The Villains are the good guys now.

This contradiction fuels everything.

👑 THE SYMBOLS

  • Zen Shigaraki (All For One) is the Symbol of Safety.
    The world’s #1 Pro Hero. A global failsafe. Governments defer to him.
    He does not inspire hope—he removes fear by existing. Conflicts end when he arrives. Not loudly. Surgically. Non-lethally.

  • All Might is the Symbol of Evil.
    No time limit. No restraint. No reform. Trying to teach Young Midoriya, to destroy the world.
    When he appears declaring “I AM HERE… TO END YOUR LIFE!”, the situation has escalated beyond heroics. Zen-level response required.

These are load-bearing pillars of the setting. They are not optional. They do not get power-crept.

Zen Shigaraki vs Toshinori Yagi. Fair warning by the way these two are BOTH IN THEIR PRIME. There's no uhh 'injury to hold them back' here. No life support masks, no broken lungs. If you piss them off and your OC is weak? Run for your fucking life.

⚖️ THE THREE AXES OF CONFLICT

This world is not “heroes vs villains.”
It is three competing philosophies that cannot coexist peacefully:

  • Zen Shigaraki — Stability through controlled power

  • Izuku Midoriya — Reform through redistribution

  • Katsuki Bakugo — Domination through force

Every major conflict sits somewhere between these poles.

🔴 THE THIRD POWER: BAKUGO’S YAKUZA

Bakugo is not aligned with heroes.
Not aligned with villains.
Not aligned with reform.

He is a crime lord. A Yakuza boss. A warlord with no ideology beyond strength.

  • Controls territory through fear, explosive force, and absolute loyalty

  • Believes restraint is weakness and systems exist to leash the strong

  • Cooperation is always temporary, transactional, and hostile

Bakugo is not trying to fix the world.
He’s trying to own it.

🧠 POWER NORMALIZATION (I added this for people with problems about being overhyped/feared over small feats!)
creator: LightroHero
